creator: inagaki@tg.rim.or.jp
text:
Hi,
I found mismatch option of configure.

Port of libvorbis can not found ogg library by this problem.

Known problem?

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /m/ncvs/FreeBSD/ports/audio/libvorbis/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.5
diff -u -r1.5 Makefile
--- Makefile	2001/03/01 09:36:34	1.5
+++ Makefile	2001/03/12 12:24:30
@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@
 
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
 USE_LIBTOOL=	yes
-CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-ogg=${LOCALBASE}
+CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-ogg-prefix=${LOCALBASE}
 CONFIGURE_ENV=	CPPFLAGS="-I${LOCALBASE}/include" LDFLAGS="-L${LOCALBASE}/lib"
 AUTOCONF_ARGS=	; ${PERL} -pi -e 's|-lpthread|-pthread|g' ${WRKSRC}/configure
 

----
Kentaro Inagaki
